title: Week 9-12 Mock Exam 1
description: Practice quiz with mixed question types

questions.explanation: NLP stands for Natural Language Processing.

questions.prompt: Which type of model is easier to interpret?
Fill in the blank: The dataset used to fit model parameters is the ______ set.
questions.explanation: The training set is used to learn the model parameters.

questions.prompt:
What is the output of:
```python
def f():
    return 10
    print('Hi')

print(f())
```
questions.explanation: Code after return does not run, and print(f()) is outside the function, so the output is 10.
